title: Dense Jammy Tunisian Dish Mushimono
description: A light, jammy, and molten Tunisian dish made with dark soy sauce and steamed to perfection. Perfect for a healthy and delicious low-calorie meal.
instructions: Combine chicken breast, potatoes, lemon juice, garlic, and capers in a bowl, and mix well.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat, and fry the vegetables for 3-4 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the fried vegetables to the bowl and mix well with the chicken and potatoes.
Transfer the mixture to a steamer and steam for 15-20 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
